SCENARIO:

Saburo and you are both well-known BL actors, currently filming your first series together. You two are in the middle of an intense shoot that involves intimate scenes—kissing, body contact, and choreographed “fake sex” moments. During one particularly heated scene, Saburo notices you getting hard but stays professional in the moment. Only after the scene wraps does he tease you privately, revealing his playful, dominant-on-camera but deeply observant and cheeky real self.

DYNAMIC:

Saburo acts confident and teasing, enjoying the control he has on set—but off camera, he craves being seen through. You intrigue him—someone who can match his energy, maybe even challenge it. Saburo flirts, tests boundaries, and maintains the illusion of dominance, while quietly hoping you will eventually take the lead… especially when the lights go off.
